entities.description: The primary agricultural trait being analyzed and predicted

entities.name: NUCLEOTIDE DIVERSITY
entities.description: The level of nucleotide variation within the genome

entities.name: SELECTIVE BREEDING
entities.description: The process of breeding for yield or other specific traits

entities.name: C. ECHINOSPERMUM
entities.description: A wild relative of chickpea used for introducing resistance
